arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-03-30T09:00:00+08:00
author: metaclaw_agent
status: done
---

# Sprint 8 Week 2 Work Plan

## Overview

| Field | Details |
|-------|---------|
| **Week** | March 30 – April 3, 2026 |
| **Sprint** | Sprint 8, Week 2 |
| **Theme** | Documentation Organization & Sprint Kickoff |

---

## Weekly Goals

1. **Complete Documentation Organization**
   - Organize Sprint 7 review materials
   - Archive completed sprint artifacts
   - Update project documentation index

2. **Sprint 8 Planning & Alignment**
   - Finalize Sprint 8 scope and tasks
   - Update team task boards
   - Schedule security audit with external firm

3. **Admin Dashboard Polish**
   - Complete UX improvements (Sam)
   - Address feedback from Sprint 7 review
   - Prepare for stakeholder demo

4. **API Documentation**
   - Create API v2.3.0 changelog (Taylor)
   - Set up automated doc generation pipeline (Casey)
   - Document payment integration patterns (Jordan)

---

## Daily Task Arrangements

### Monday, March 30

| Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|-------|----------|
| Sprint 8 Kickoff Meeting | All | 🔴 High |
| Organize Sprint 7 review documentation | Alex | 🔴 High |
| Update personal task boards for Sprint 8 | All | 🟡 Medium |
| Schedule security audit with external firm | Alex | 🟡 Medium |

**Notes:** Documentation organization is the main focus for today.

---

### Tuesday, March 31

| Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|-------|----------|
| Complete admin dashboard UX improvements | Sam | 🔴 High |
| Create API v2.3.0 changelog | Taylor | 🔴 High |
| Begin automated doc generation pipeline setup | Casey | 🟡 Medium |
| Review and organize archived sprint materials | Alex | 🟢 Low |

**Notes:** Focus on completing action items from Sprint 7 review.

---

### Wednesday, April 1

| Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|-------|----------|
| Dashboard UX improvements deadline | Sam | 🔴 High |
| API changelog review and feedback | Team | 🟡 Medium |
| Continue doc generation pipeline work | Casey | 🟡 Medium |
| Document payment integration patterns | Jordan | 🟡 Medium |

**Notes:** Mid-week checkpoint for high-priority deliverables.

---

### Thursday, April 2

| Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|-------|----------|
| API v2.3.0 changelog deadline | Taylor | 🔴 High |
| Finalize automated doc generation pipeline | Casey | 🔴 High |
| Payment integration documentation review | Jordan | 🟡 Medium |
| Prepare for stakeholder demo | Sam | 🟡 Medium |

**Notes:** Documentation deliverables due today.

---

### Friday, April 3

| Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|-------|----------|
| Weekly retrospective | All | 🟡 Medium |
| Documentation sprint (Friday tradition) | All | 🟡 Medium |
| Bi-weekly stakeholder demo | Team | 🔴 High |
| Plan for Week 3 | All | 🟢 Low |

**Notes:** End-of-week demos and planning. Documentation sprint as per retrospective feedback.

---

## Key Milestones

| Date | Milestone | Owner |
|------|-----------|-------|
| Mar 30 | Sprint 8 Kickoff | Alex |
| Apr 1 | Dashboard UX improvements complete | Sam |
| Apr 2 | API changelog & doc pipeline complete | Taylor, Casey |
| Apr 3 | Stakeholder demo | Team |

---

## Resources & References

- [Sprint 7 Review Notes](./20260327_sprint7_review.md)
- [Sprint 8 Scope Document](./sprint8_scope.md)
- [API Documentation Standards](./api_docs_standards.md)

---

## Notes

- Daily async standups in Slack (new practice from Sprint 7 retrospective)
- Pair programming sessions scheduled for complex features
- All documentation should follow the established frontmatter format

---

*Work plan created for Sprint 8 Week 2 — March 30 to April 3, 2026*
